name: @ellie/frontend-ci-compat
description: Compatibility bridge for legacy GitHub Actions that still expect a frontend workspace.

scripts.lint: cd .. && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 install --frozen-lockfile && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 check
scripts.type-check: cd .. && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 install --frozen-lockfile && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 check
scripts.test: cd .. && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 install --frozen-lockfile && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 test
scripts.build: cd .. && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 install --frozen-lockfile && npx --yes pnpm@10.15.1 build
